ocr_findings.description: OCR line 24 output example shows 9 '☆' characters ('☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆') but image shows 10 '☆' characters — one star missing from the output example box (cosmetic, the explanatory text correctly states 10)

reviewer_notes: Page 357 covers while-loop programming with a code example and explanation table. The code block, all table rows, and body text are faithfully captured. The only deviation is one missing '☆' in the output example (9 vs 10), which is cosmetic given the surrounding explanatory text correctly states 10 are output. Page number 341 is present.
